---
title: Profiling
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false

library(lineprof)

devtools::load_all(".")
verbose(FALSE)
#source("profile/stats-custom.R")

files <- list.files("psych_science_xml", "xml$", full.names = TRUE)
```


### read_grobid

```{r}
lineprof( papers <- read(files[1:50]) )
```


### concat_tables

```{r}
lineprof( refs <- concat_tables(papers, "bib") )
lineprof( cite <- concat_tables(papers, "xrefs") )
```

### text_search

```{r}
lineprof( res <- text_search(papers, section = "results") )
```

### stats

```{r}
lineprof( sc <- stats(res) )
```

## Modules

### all-p-values

```{r}
lineprof( p <- module_run(res, "all-p-values") )
```



## Long Paper Lists

```{r}
ps <- readRDS("../vignettes/psysci_oa.Rds")
ps <- ps[1:30]
```

```{r}
lineprof( text <- text_search(ps, "signif") )
```

```{r}
lineprof( exp <- text_expand(text, ps) )
```

```{r}
lineprof( exp1 <- text_expand(text, ps, plus = 1) )
```
